## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue (if any). Please also include relevant motivation and context.

Fixes # (issue reference if applicable)

## Type of Change

Please delete options that are not relevant.

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] 🚀 New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] ⚠️ Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update (README, CONTRIBUTORS, code docstrings)
- [ ] 🔧 Chore (build scripts, config files, refactoring with no functional changes)

## How Has This Been Tested?

Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes. Provide instructions so we can reproduce.

- [ ] Manual test: (describe steps, endpoints tested, e.g. API key auth or OAuth2 flow)
- [ ] Automated tests: (if any are introduced or run)

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the code style of this project (WordPress standards preferred).
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or PHP errors.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly.
